xanesnet.analysis package¶

Analysis pipeline registries and component package exports.

class xanesnet.analysis.SelectorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for selector classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a selector class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Selector]], type[Selector]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the selector class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Selector]

Returns:

Registered selector class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no selector is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered selector names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.analysis.CollectorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for collector classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a collector class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Collector]], type[Collector]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the collector class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Collector]

Returns:

Registered collector class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no collector is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered collector names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.analysis.AggregatorRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for aggregator classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register an aggregator class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Aggregator]], type[Aggregator]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the aggregator class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Aggregator]

Returns:

Registered aggregator class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no aggregator is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered aggregator names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.analysis.PlotterRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for plotter classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a plotter class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Plotter]], type[Plotter]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the plotter class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Plotter]

Returns:

Registered plotter class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no plotter is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered plotter names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

class xanesnet.analysis.ReporterRegistry[source]¶

Bases: object

Name-based registry for reporter classes.

classmethod register(name)[source]¶

Register a reporter class under name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

Callable[[type[Reporter]], type[Reporter]]

Returns:

Decorator that registers and returns the class unchanged.

Raises:

KeyError – If name is already registered.

classmethod get(name)[source]¶

Return the reporter class registered as name.

Parameters:

name (str) – Registry key. Matching is case-insensitive.

Return type:

type[Reporter]

Returns:

Registered reporter class.

Raises:

KeyError – If no reporter is registered under name.

classmethod list()[source]¶

Return all registered reporter names.

Return type:

list[str]

Returns:

Registry keys in insertion order.

Submodules¶

xanesnet.analysis.result module¶

Dataclasses shared across analysis pipeline stages.

class xanesnet.analysis.result.AnalysisResults(selectors, collector_results, aggregator_results, selectors_config=<factory>, collectors_config=<factory>, aggregators_config=<factory>)[source]¶

Bases: object

Bundle of outputs produced by the analysis pipeline.

selectors¶

Selector instances grouped by prediction reader and selector index.

collector_results¶

Per-sample collector output streams grouped like selectors.

aggregator_results¶

Aggregation outputs grouped by prediction reader, selector, and aggregator.

selectors_config¶

Selector configuration dictionaries in pipeline order.

collectors_config¶

Collector configuration dictionaries in pipeline order.

aggregators_config¶

Aggregator configuration dictionaries in pipeline order.

selectors: list[list[Selector]]¶
collector_results: list[list[JSONLStream]]¶
aggregator_results: list[list[list[AggregatorResult]]]¶
selectors_config: list[dict[str, Any]]¶
collectors_config: list[dict[str, Any]]¶
aggregators_config: list[dict[str, Any]]¶
__init__(selectors, collector_results, aggregator_results, selectors_config=<factory>, collectors_config=<factory>, aggregators_config=<factory>)¶
